OBERONPRETENDER-RYE_RHYME_GOODFELLOW.des: #Consume ALL your *NP Charge, at least !ChargeCost!. Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies, plus !PerTen! for every 10 NP Charge above the minimum. Remove all positive Strength from all enemies. All enemies fall *Asleep.

OBERONPRETENDER-ENDING_OF_DREAMS.descrip: #This turn, your Attacks deal 50% more and your next NP card deals double. At the end of your turn, lose all positive Powers and do not draw next turn.
